attributes.action: Require Hull City AFC to redesign the 2026/27 home kit
attributes.additional_details:
Hull City supporters have suffered enough over the years, but the 2026/27 home kit may be the final straw.

We believe Oxen Sports should be asked to explain how this design made it through multiple meetings, drafts, approvals and quality checks before being released to the 

We therefore call upon Parliament to encourage Hull City AFC and Oxen Sports to reconsider this diabolical design before further damage is done to supporter morale.

UTFT.
attributes.background: We call on the UK Government to urge Acun Ilicali and Hull City AFC to replace the current home kit. Supporters believe it resembles a newspaper token special, lacks traditional Hull City identity, and may cause unnecessary distress to Tigers fans nationwide. Immediate action is required.
